auth.loginDescription: Enter your credentials to access your workspace.
auth.forgotDescription: Enter your email address to receive a reset link.
auth.forgotSuccess: If an account exists with this email, you will receive a password reset link.
auth.confirmError: This link is invalid or has expired. Please try again.
auth.resetDescription: Choose a new password for your account.
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters.
auth.resetError: An error occurred. Please try again.
